mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file ( file_name, file_type, file_content_type, file_extension, file_path, file_size, file_status, create_datetime ) VALUES ( #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileContentType}, #{fileExtension}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{status}, #{createDatetime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS file_id, file_name, file_type, file_content_type, file_extension, file_path, file_size, file_status FROM file WHERE id = #{fileId}
